backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining an esports backend with in-memory maps for announcements and roster members, exposing CRUD query/update methods for both collections.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the replacement of the third footer social icon with a WhatsApp SVG linking to a specific WhatsApp channel, targeting Footer.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose, styling, and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Legend X Esports PWA with meta tags, manifest link, apple-touch-icon references, and service worker registration script.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Legend X Esports defining app name, icons, theme colors, display mode, and categories for installability.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first with background refresh strategy for GET requests, skipping cross-origin and API calls, with offline fallback to index.html.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, LandingPage, and AdminPanel into the full application layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel, and a four-card values grid with icons for Discipline, Excellence, Victory, and Brotherhood.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Floating admin panel widget with tabbed UI for managing roster members and announcements via add, edit, and delete operations backed by React Query mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Renders a styled card for a single announcement, displaying its title, body, and ICP nanosecond timestamp formatted as a human-readable date.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the brand logo, a description, social media icon links, and quick navigation links.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, overlays, the Legend X Esports title, tagline, CTA buttons, and summary stats.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, desktop nav links, a 'Visit Website' CTA, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: Displays a grid of AnnouncementCards fetched via a React Query hook, with loading skeletons, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Renders a styled card for a roster player showing their avatar image, name, and role with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: A fixed top banner that prompts users to install the app as a PWA, handling the beforeinstallprompt event and providing iOS fallback instructions.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: Renders the team roster section with loading skeletons, error, and empty states, displaying player cards in a responsive grid fetched via the useRoster hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating announcements and roster members via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file importing Google Fonts and Tailwind layers, defining CSS custom properties for the dark esports theme and utility classes for glows, typography, and clip-path effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the landing page by assembling Hero, About, Roster, News, and Footer sections in order.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with esports color tokens, custom fonts, box shadows, keyframe animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state including existing features and a pending request to replace a footer social icon with the WhatsApp logo and link.
